USAGE:
    faceoffx [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    faceoffx process photo.jpg
    faceoffx process photo.jpg --output result.jp2
    faceoffx process photo.jpg --verbose
    faceoffx roi photo.jpg
    faceoffx roi photo.jpg --output roi_visual.jpg --show-landmarks

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    process <INPUT>    Process images for PIV compliance (JPEG 2000 output)    
    roi <INPUT>        Visualize facial ROI Inner Region for JPEG 2000 encoding

_____                          ___    _____   _____        
 |  ___|   __ _    ___    ___   / _ \  |  ___| |  ___| __  __
 | |_     / _` |  / __|  / _ \ | | | | | |_    | |_    \ \/ /
 |  _|   | (_| | | (__  |  __/ | |_| | |  _|   |  _|    >  < 
 |_|      \__,_|  \___|  \___|  \___/  |_|     |_|     /_/\_\
                                                             
"I want to take his face... off." - Face/Off (1997)

DESCRIPTION:
Process images for PIV compliance (JPEG 2000 output)

USAGE:
    faceoffx process <INPUT> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    faceoffx process photo.jpg
    faceoffx process photo.jpg --output result.jp2
    faceoffx process photo.jpg --verbose

ARGUMENTS:
    <INPUT>    Input image file path

OPTIONS:
                                         DEFAULT                                
    -h, --help                                      Prints help information     
    -o, --output <PATH>                             Output file path            
        --rate <RATE>                    0.7        JPEG 2000 base compression  
                                                    rate in bits per pixel      
        --roi-level <LEVEL>              3          ROI resolution level        
                                                    priority: 0=aggressive,     
                                                    1=balanced, 2=conservative, 
                                                    3=smoothest                 
        --no-roi                                    Disable ROI encoding for    
                                                    uniform quality             
        --align                                     Enable ROI alignment with   
                                                    compression blocks (may     
                                                    create harsh boundaries)    
        --verbose                                   Show detailed processing    
                                                    information                 
        --debug                                     Enable debug logging for    
                                                    troubleshooting             
        --preset <PRESET>                           Processing preset: piv-high 
                                                    (30KB), piv-balanced (20KB),
                                                    twic-max (14KB), piv-min    
                                                    (12KB)                      
        --target-size <SIZE>                        Target file size in bytes   
                                                    (overrides preset and rate) 
        --min-confidence <CONFIDENCE>    0.8        Minimum face detection      
                                                    confidence (0.0 to 1.0)     
        --max-rotation <DEGREES>         15         Maximum rotation angle in   
                                                    degrees for face alignment

                                                    priority: 0=aggressive,

"I want to take his face... off." - Face/Off (1997)

DESCRIPTION:
Visualize facial ROI Inner Region for JPEG 2000 encoding

USAGE:
    faceoffx roi <INPUT> [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    faceoffx roi photo.jpg
    faceoffx roi photo.jpg --output roi_visual.jpg --show-landmarks
    faceoffx roi photo.jpg --stroke-width 5 --verbose

ARGUMENTS:
    <INPUT>    Path to the input image file

OPTIONS:
                            DEFAULT                                             
    -h, --help                         Prints help information                  
    -o, --output                       Output path for the ROI visualization    
    -f, --format            JPEG       Output image format (JPEG or PNG)        
    -q, --quality           95         JPEG quality (1-100)                     
        --stroke-width      3          ROI bounding box stroke width            
        --show-labels       True       Show ROI priority labels                 
        --show-landmarks    True       Include 68-point landmarks in            
                                       visualization                            
        --show-piv-lines               Include PIV compliance lines (AA, BB, CC)
                                       in visualization                         
    -v, --verbose                      Enable verbose output                    
        --debug                        Enable debug logging for troubleshooting 
        --no-boxes                     Skip drawing ROI boxes
